## Summary

Brief description of what this PR does and why.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature / extension point
- [ ] Performance improvement
- [ ] Refactor (no behaviour change)
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other:

## How was it tested?

Describe the tests added or the manual steps used to verify the change.

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass (`uv run python -m unittest discover tests/`)
- [ ] New tests added for the new functionality
- [ ] Documentation updated (if a public interface or extension point changed)
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `[Unreleased]`

## Breaking changes

List any breaking changes to public APIs or CLI flags, or write "None".
